The [[Starship/Legends|starship]] '''''Kai Mir''''' was the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] of the [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] smuggler [[Ellor]].

It was part of the [[Smugglers' Alliance]] fleet in the [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of Bilbringi]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last Command]]'' {{Ab|The Last Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*[[The Last Command 3|''The Last Command'' 3]]
